# Shape Up — Introduction

## What is Shape Up?

Shape Up is a product development methodology developed by Ryan Singer at Basecamp/37signals that combines fixed-time cycles with structured shaping to escape the estimation trap.

---

## Core Value Proposition

| Traditional Planning | Shape Up Approach |
|---------------------|-------------------|
| "How long will this take?" | "How much time are we willing to spend?" |
| Estimates drive scope | Appetite constrains scope |
| Open-ended sprints | Fixed 6-week cycles |
| Scope creep is common | Scope is renegotiated, not expanded |
| Status theater in standups | Real progress on Hill Charts |

---

## When to Use Shape Up

### Best Fits
- Teams of 3+ people doing real product work
- Products with uncertain requirements
- Companies that can protect 6-week time boxes
- Organizations that trust engineers to self-organize

### Not a Fit
- Maintenance-only teams
- Strict contractual timelines (legal/regulatory)
- Teams too small to formalize (just talk to each other)
- Feature factories with no product thinking

---

## Key Terms

| Term | Definition |
|------|------------|
| **Appetite** | Time budget (1-2 weeks = Small, 6 weeks = Big) |
| **Pitch** | Shaped work ready for betting |
| **Fat Marker Sketch** | Rough visual showing the solution idea |
| **Betting Table** | Commitment ceremony at cycle start |
| **Hill Chart** | Progress visualization: uphill = unknowns, downhill = execution |
| **Circuit Breaker** | Emergency stop during build |
| **Cool-down** | 2-week break between cycles |

---

## The Shape Up Cycle

```
6-Week Cycle:
┌─────────────────────────────────────┐
│  SHAPING (parallel, by PM+eng)     │
│  • Problem: narrow to specific     │
│  • Appetite: S/M/L time budget     │
│  • Solution: fat marker sketches  │
│  • Rabbit holes: call out unknowns │
└─────────────────────────────────────┘
              ↓ Betting Table
┌─────────────────────────────────────┐
│  BUILDING (by autonomous team)     │
│  • Self-scoped tasks from pitch    │
│  • Progress on Hill Charts        │
│  • No scope creep without renegot. │
└─────────────────────────────────────┘
              ↓ Cool-down
┌─────────────────────────────────────┐
│  COOL-DOWN (2 weeks)               │
│  • No scheduled work               │
│  • Bugs, exploration, projects     │
└─────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

| Upstream (Before) | This Skill | Downstream (After) |
|-------------------|------------|-------------------|
| Jobs-to-be-Done | Shape Up | Status Update Writer |
